title: delissea tritomantha var. lydgatei
intro: Delissea tritomantha var. lydgatei, also known as Lydgate's delissea, is a species of flowering plant in the heath family. It is native to Hawaii and is considered an endangered species. This plant is used in traditional medicine for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help to soothe wounds and reduce swelling. The health benefits of Delissea tritomantha var. lydgatei include its potential to aid in the treatment of colds, fever, and skin conditions, and it is typically prepared as a tea or poultice for medicinal use.
